posts.community: Bluestone Jewellery - A tech platform disguised as fine jewelry
posts.text: image 799×239 10.2 KB ORIGIN STORY - The Story of Bluestone is as fantastical as its rise from 0-8000 crores in under a decade. Gaurav Kushwaha (the founder of Bluestone Jewelry) had never been to a jewelry store in his life till it was time for him to do his wedding shopping. The business was born out of his own frustration as a first time consumer. He found the entire offline experience highly inefficient and lacking in transparency. His primary frustration was the complete lack of “discoverability.” If you wanted a specific design or had a specific price range in mind, you couldn’t just bro…
